ogTitle: Bohle Plains vs Bokarina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bohle Plains and Bokarina.
heading: Bohle Plains vs Bokarina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bohle Plains, Queensland and Bokarina, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bohle Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bokarina (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bohle Plains or Bokarina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bohle Plains has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Bokarina scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bohle Plains scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Bokarina scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bohle Plains or Bokarina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bohle Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
